summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: a new canonical `useGetMaintenanceFundBalance` hook with query key `['maintenanceFundBalance']`, mutation invalidation for all maintenance-related mutations, and FinancialMetrics component updated to use the ledger-derived balance. The backend main.mo is modified but the diff is truncated so full REQ-2 compliance cannot be fully verified. No hardcoded fallback values appear to remain in the visible frontend code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit the backend Motoko actor to ensure the Maintenance Fund balance is computed from a single authoritative source. Remove any separate balance variable that is updated independently and can diverge from the transaction-based calculation.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is heavily truncated. While the file is listed as modified and a new getMaintenanceFundBalance function is referenced in frontend hooks, we cannot confirm from the diff that: (1) the balance is exclusively derived from transaction history, (2) no separate stable balance variable remains, or (3) the old balance field on the fund record is no longer used as source of truth for the maintenance fund.

hallucinated_features.description: A new backend/migration.mo module was added with a full data migration system including type definitions for OldMainActor and a migration runner.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request makes no mention of adding a migration module or data migration infrastructure. The requirements are scoped to fixing balance desynchronization only.

hallucinated_features.description: A DataMigrationHandler React component was added/modified to migrate legacy localStorage data (jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, goals) to the backend.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request any data migration UI or localStorage migration functionality. This is outside the scope of the maintenance fund balance fix.
